caption: A man with a shaved head, dark beard, and headphones is seated in a recording studio, positioned in front of a professional condenser microphone. He wears a white t-shirt that features the text "Stay Humble" partially visible on the chest. The background consists of dark gray acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. As the sequence progresses, the man looks toward someone off-camera to his right, shifting his gaze and subtly changing his facial expression. He begins with a focused look, transitions into a slight smile while speaking, and then looks slightly downward. The microphone remains stationary in the foreground, held by a shock mount and a boom arm. The lighting is consistent across the scenes, highlighting the man's face and the metallic surfaces of the recording equipment.
